name: Ecwid
description: An ecommerce platform that provides online store management and a REST API (v3) for accessing store data and building apps/integrations.

auth_methods.note: Ecwid supports OAuth 2.0 for third‑party/public apps and store access tokens (used as Bearer tokens or access_token query parameter) for custom/private apps.

credential_access.note: Developers can create a custom app in the Ecwid Control Panel and obtain client_id/client_secret and access tokens directly via the UI; docs show creating apps and copying tokens without requiring partner approval or paid plan.

api_surface.note: Documentation and quickstart show Ecwid REST API v3 endpoints for store objects (products, profile, etc.), indicating a broad REST API surface. No GraphQL or SDK‑only indication on docs root.

buildability.note: Public docs provide REST API reference and guides; developers can self‑create apps and tokens in the control panel to start building immediately.

queries: Make your first API request Ecwid
Set up your dev environment in Ecwid
